title: Clawster Tauri Rewrite - Gap Fixes
description: Fix all missing/incomplete features identified in the architect comparison between Electron and Tauri implementations.

stories.title: CRITICAL: Global hotkey registration
stories.description: Register 3 global shortcuts from store (openChat, captureScreen, openAssistant). Hotkeys toggle windows and notify tutorial manager.
acceptanceCriteria: register_hotkeys() function exists and is called during app startup
Cmd+Shift+Space toggles chatbar window
Cmd+Shift+/ triggers screenshot capture and opens screenshot-question window
Cmd+Shift+A toggles assistant window
Hotkeys read from store settings, not hardcoded
Tutorial manager is notified when openChat or openAssistant hotkey is pressed
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: CRITICAL: Onboarding flow orchestration
stories.description: Show onboarding window on first launch instead of pet. After onboarding completes/skips, close onboarding and start main app (pet, services, tutorial).
acceptanceCriteria: If onboarding.completed is false and onboarding.skipped is false, show onboarding window instead of pet
Pet window stays hidden until onboarding completes
onboarding_complete command closes onboarding window and calls startMainApp equivalent
onboarding_skip command closes onboarding window and calls startMainApp equivalent
startMainApp creates pet window, registers hotkeys, initializes ClawBot, starts watchers and tutorial
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: CRITICAL: update_settings side effects
stories.description: When settings change via update_settings, trigger side effects: restart watchers for watch.*, re-register hotkeys for hotkeys.*, update ClawBot config for clawbot.*, emit events for pet/dev settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Changing watch.activeApp or watch.folders triggers watcher restart
Changing hotkeys.* re-registers global shortcuts
Changing clawbot.url or clawbot.token updates ClawBot client config
Changing pet.transparentWhenSleeping emits pet-transparent-sleep-changed event
Changing dev.showPetModeOverlay emits dev-show-pet-mode-overlay-changed event
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: HIGH: send_to_clawbot with chat history, screen context, and action execution
stories.description: Fix send_to_clawbot and start_clawbot_stream to include chat history from store, auto-detect screen keywords, execute pet actions from response, and show pet response bubble.
acceptanceCriteria: send_to_clawbot reads chat history from store and passes it to clawbot.chat()
start_clawbot_stream reads chat history from store and passes it to clawbot.chat_stream()
If includeScreen is true, screen context is captured and appended to message
After response, pet actions from ClawBot response are executed via execute_pet_action
Response text is emitted as chat-popup to pet window (unless from chatbar)
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: HIGH: ClawBot analyzeScreen with image support
stories.description: Implement full analyzeScreen in ClawBot client supporting Responses API with input_image, Chat Completions fallback with image_url, and file path fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: analyze_screen() method exists on ClawBotClient
Sends image via Responses API input_image part with base64 source
Falls back to Chat Completions with image_url if Responses returns 404/405
ask_about_screen command uses analyze_screen() instead of plain chat()
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: HIGH: Pet window saved position restore and response action structure
stories.description: Restore pet saved position on launch. Fix ClawBot response action structure to match frontend expectations (action.payload wrapping).
acceptanceCriteria: On startup, pet window position is restored from store pet.position
If no saved position, defaults to bottom-right corner
Pet window uses setAlwaysOnTop with screen-saver level on macOS
ClawBotResponse.action wraps as {type, payload} matching Electron format
pet-drag command saves position to store and hides context menu
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: MEDIUM: Window blur-to-hide and pet chat auto-hide
stories.description: Add on-blur auto-hide for chatbar, context menu, screenshot-question windows. Add pet chat auto-hide timer (10s).
acceptanceCriteria: Chatbar window hides when it loses focus
Pet context menu window hides when it loses focus
Screenshot question window hides when it loses focus
Pet chat auto-hides after 10 seconds (PET_CHAT_AUTO_HIDE_MS)
Pet chat auto-hide timer resets on interaction
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors

stories.title: MEDIUM: OpenClaw config filenames and tutorial step 4 cursor tracking
stories.description: Fix OpenClaw config to read correct filename (openclaw.json). Fix workspace file names (IDENTITY.md/SOUL.md uppercase). Implement tutorial step 4 cursor tracking and follow behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: read_openclaw_config reads ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (not config.yaml)
read_openclaw_workspace reads IDENTITY.md and SOUL.md (uppercase)
create_clawster_workspace writes IDENTITY.md and SOUL.md (uppercase) and saves workspace path to store
Tutorial step 4 starts cursor tracking - when cursor > 200px from pet, pet follows
After 2 follow moves or catching cursor, advances to step 5
Tutorial start() moves pet to screen center first
Cargo build succeeds with 0 errors
